summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 12 warning, 13 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:128-132` — `process.exit` monkey-patch is fragile coupling to `run.mjs` internals; consider an explicit `{ throwOnExit: true }` contract on `runSingleFeature`
🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:82` + `bin/lib/util.mjs:100` — Lock path `.team/.cron-lock` becomes `.team/.cron-lock.lock` due to `lockFile()` appending `.lock`; naming is confusing

🟡 `bin/agt.mjs:73` — Bare `catch { process.exit(1); }` discards error objects. Expected pre-flight errors are fine (already logged by tsError), but unexpected bugs produce silent exit(1). Fix: `catch (e) { console.error(e); process.exit(1); }`

🟡 `STATE.json` — Feature marked "completed" but only 2/13 harness tasks passed; tasks 14-19 completed the work outside the sprint flow. Cost tracking ($51.03) doesn't cover the corrective pass. Backlog: reconciliation logic for out-of-band completions.
🟡 `tasks/task-19/artifacts/test-output.txt` — Missing on disk despite being expected by the artifact contract. Backlog: ensure build nodes write test-output.txt.

🟡 `test/cron-tick.test.mjs` (missing) — No test for `commentIssue` throwing during failure recovery (cron.mjs:161-162); the `recovery (comment) failed` log line is the only untested error path in the recovery block

🟡 `test/cron-tick.test.mjs` (missing) — No test for `setProjectItemStatus` throwing on the done transition (cron.mjs:143-144); same code pattern as in-progress throw but this specific branch unexercised
🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:129-131` — `process.exit(0)` triggers failure recovery path (revert + comment), semantically wrong for clean exit; add test documenting behavior or differentiate exit codes

🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:128` — `process.exit()` interception is not async-safe; board item can be stuck in "in-progress" for one cron interval if `runSingleFeature` spawns async work that calls `process.exit()` after restoration. Mitigated by stale-lock recovery on next tick.
🟡 `bin/agt.mjs:73` — `catch { process.exit(1); }` silently swallows errors. Change to `catch (e) { console.error(e); process.exit(1); }` for defensive logging.

🟡 `bin/agt.mjs:248+890` — Help text duplicated in two code paths (~20 identical lines each). Pre-existing pattern; cron feature added 2 lines to both copies. Extract to a shared function to prevent drift.
🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:128-132` — `process.exit` monkey-patching is a global side effect. Safe due to advisory lock preventing concurrent same-process runs, but the invariant should be documented.
